title: listrostachys pertusa
intro: Listrostachys pertusa, also known as "Puna Tea Tree" or "Puna Kukui", is a shrub native to Hawaii and other Pacific Island regions. Its medicinal properties are primarily derived from its leaves, which contain essential oils with antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting tissue healing. Listrostachys pertusa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a versatile natural remedy in traditional Hawaiian medicine.
